title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Wrogn - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Wrogn - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Wrogn! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Wrogn:
Wrogn is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wrogn!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
